title: Boolean checks should not be inverted
description: Avoid using the not operator in boolean checks as it can lead to confusion and errors.
recommendation: Rewrite the boolean check without the 'not' operator.

noncompliant.description: Incorrect use of 'not' in a boolean check

compliant.description: Correct use of a boolean check

why_is_this_an_issue: Using 'not' in boolean checks can lead to confusion and errors.
how_to_fix: Rewrite the boolean check without the 'not' operator.
